tasks.task_description: Copy outlook_calendar_direct.py and sfdc_direct.py to src-server/integrations/
Create backend API routes in voltagent-runtime.ts for /sa/calendar/events and /sa/meeting/analyze that call Python integration scripts
Update SADashboard.tsx to fetch from backend API and render calendar view with meeting details similar to sa-automation CalendarView

description: Integrate sa-automation backend code into work-agent for SA Dashboard
